user-agent-rotation.name: User-Agent Rotation
user-agent-rotation.desc: Rotate through 50+ modern browser UA strings on every request

proxy-rotation.name: IP Rotation & Proxy Support
proxy-rotation.desc: Route requests through HTTP/SOCKS5 rotating proxy backbones

header-spoofing.name: HTTP Header Spoofing
header-spoofing.desc: Randomize Accept-Language, Referer, and DNT headers

exponential-backoff.name: Exponential Backoff
exponential-backoff.desc: Retry with increasing delays (2s, 4s, 8s...) on 429/403 errors

request-jitter.name: Randomized Request Jitter
request-jitter.desc: Add random delay (0.5-3s) between requests to mimic humans

headless-browser.name: Headless Browser Emulation
headless-browser.desc: Render JS-heavy anti-bot pages via Playwright or Puppeteer

captcha-solver.name: Captcha Solver Integration
captcha-solver.desc: Hook into 2Captcha or Anti-Captcha API when challenges appear

cookie-persistence.name: Cookie Persistence & Aging
cookie-persistence.desc: Maintain sessions and age cookies before high-volume scrapes

tls-fingerprint.name: TLS/SSL Fingerprint Randomization
tls-fingerprint.desc: Mimic specific browser TLS fingerprints (JA3) per request

browser-fingerprint.name: Browser Fingerprint Spoofing
browser-fingerprint.desc: Randomize Canvas, WebGL, and screen resolution in headless mode

geolocation-spoofing.name: Geolocation Spoofing
geolocation-spoofing.desc: Align IP location with browser timezone and coordinates

honeypot-detection.name: Honey Pot Link Detection
honeypot-detection.desc: Identify and skip hidden display:none links designed to trap bots

human-simulation.name: Human Interaction Simulation
human-simulation.desc: Random mouse movements and scroll patterns in headless browsers

protocol-rotation.name: Protocol Rotation
protocol-rotation.desc: Switch between HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 to bypass server-side filters
